title: acokanthera rotundata
intro: Acokanthera rotundata, also known as the "Kokopu" or "Koko", is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The medicinal properties of Acokanthera rotundata lie in its roots, which contain the toxic cardiac glycoside acokantherin A, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, Acokanthera rotundata is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
